creator: mickey242@gmx.net
text:
Any progress on this one? I am having the same problem on FreeBSD 10.2:

FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p1 i386

===> The following configuration options are available for kamailio-4.2.4_1:
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     JABBER=off: Jabber communications protocol support
     JITSI=off: VoIP Frontend GUI via Jitsi
     MYSQL=off: MySQL database support
     PGSQL=off: PostgreSQL database support
     PRESENCE=off: Presence support
     RADIUS=off: RADIUS protocol support
     TLS=on: Secure network connection support via TLS
     UNIXODBC=off: ODBC backend via unixODBC
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings
